aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.info: Principal Engineer with 13+ years of experience designing and scaling enterprise digital platforms and intelligent systems. Expertise in React and Next.js architectures, micro frontend platforms, server-driven UI, and performance engineering focused on Core Web Vitals. Strong foundation in TypeScript, Node.js, HTML5, CSS3, and modern testing practices. Expanding into AI-native and data-driven platform development using Python and FastAPI, with a focus on context engineering, agentic workflows, and intelligent automation. Experienced in cloud-native delivery on AWS including S3, CloudFront, Route53, and CloudFormation, supported by CI/CD pipelines to build scalable and reliable platforms.

education.title: Education
education.info: B.E (Electronics and Communication), Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore

info.title: React Profile Component
info.description: React profile component is a lightweight component which can be used to display different sections of your Profile/ Portfolio page using a configurable data approach.

info.title: Angular files
info.description: Angular files is an Intranet file sharing application and is useful to share files from a common host server by any machine connected to the Intranet.
